# Transcript
***
*OYS ADIKOY*
*LE*SASQ*I
** **** **DE*S AD*****
IA KAI H SY*MACIA TWI DHM
OIS EYBOIEYSIN EPAINESA*
HRITON KAI HRAKL*IODWRON
PROQYMOI HSAN *ERI TON DHM
I EPOIOYN O TI EDYNANTO AGA
YS KAI EGGONOYS *ROXENOYS
*HMO TO* AQHNAIWN EPAINESAI
WN AQHNAIWN TOS PEMFQENTAS
S EK TWN SY*MACWN KAI KALE
* **YTANEION EIS AYRION A
DIA TOIS PRESBES* TON TAM
*ATA UHFISMATA ANALISKO
**KONTA DRACMAS EKASTWI A
*PROXENIAN EAN KAI TWI DHM
***A THS BOYLHS EN STHLHI L
*N AKROPOLEI DEKA HMERWN EI
*HS STHLHS DOYNAI TON TAM*
DRACMAS EK TWN KATA UHFI*
WN TWI DHMWI EINAI DE TOIS
* TWN AKIDWN KAQA EPAGGEL
*****
